name: super-bootstrap
description: Self-hosted marketplace for super-bootstrap — greenfield-aware superpowers pipeline bootstrap (super-bootstrap → harness-bootstrap, plus commit, todo, help, merge, and optional release-init).

plugins.name: super-bootstrap
plugins.description: Bootstrap or sync the superpowers development pipeline in any repo. /super-bootstrap gates greenfield, /super-bootstrap:harness-bootstrap installs the harness, /super-bootstrap:commit + /super-bootstrap:todo + /super-bootstrap:help + /super-bootstrap:merge bundled (all namespaced under super-bootstrap: except the /super-bootstrap entry). Optional /super-bootstrap:release-init scaffolds a project-tailored /release skill. Solo-dev opinionated. Project-adaptive.
